paths.description: Where work-system stores tasks, worktrees, and Claude config.

tasks_dir.description: Directory holding task markdown files, relative to the repo root.

worktrees_dir.description: Directory that holds task worktrees. Default matches current behavior; the neutral `.worktrees` target is opt-in via [compat].prefer_neutral_worktrees.

claude_settings_file.description: Claude Code settings file copied into new worktrees when auto_copy_claude_settings is on.

task_prefix.description: Prefix for task branches created by /kickoff (e.g. task/<name>).

backup_prefixes.description: Branch prefixes treated as non-task backups when resolving task names.

copy_task_to_worktree.description: Copy the task file into the worktree on /kickoff instead of symlinking.

task_filename.description: Filename the task file takes inside a worktree.

auto_copy_claude_settings.description: Copy claude_settings_file into new worktrees on /kickoff.

compat.description: Migration toggles between Claude-specific and neutral conventions. Storage only in this phase; no plugin consumes them yet.

prefer_neutral_worktrees.description: When true, prefer a neutral `.worktrees` dir over `.claude/worktrees`. Off by default to match current behavior.

allow_legacy_claude_worktrees.description: Keep recognizing an existing `.claude/worktrees` dir during a migration.

related_projects.description: Address book of sibling projects this repo coordinates with. Each entry is `name = "/abs/path"`, or a table `name = { path = "/abs/path", role = "backend", tags = ["api"] }`. A missing path is a warning, not an error (machines differ). Storage/resolve only — no behavior yet.
